STATUS.md.summary: v0.1.0 initial scaffold, fan-out/pipeline/consensus modes implemented

NEXT_ACTIONS.md.summary: 5 tasks. Top: T-001 (integration test), T-002 (GitHub repo + CI)

CONVENTIONS.md.summary: English only, strict TS, no em dashes, tests required

quick_context: Initial scaffold. Plugin registers /orchestrate command with 3 modes (fan-out, pipeline, consensus), model discovery via openclaw CLI, task classification, AAHP v3 handoff objects, and 5 predefined task profiles. Needs integration testing and api.inference validation.

T-007.notes:

T-008.title: T-003: Add timeout and error recovery for workers
T-008.notes:
- Configurable timeout per worker (default 60s)
- Graceful degradation: if 1 worker fails, continue with others
- Retry logic for transient errors (429, 503)
- Report partial results if not all workers complete
